parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname / IP
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the Prusa printer.

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: HTTP port of the PrusaLink web server.

parameter.name: apiKey
parameter.label: API Key
parameter.description: PrusaLink API key (found in the printer menu under Settings → Network → PrusaLink).

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: How often to poll the printer for status updates.

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname / IP
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the Moonraker server.

parameter.name: apiKey
parameter.label: API Key
parameter.description: Moonraker API key. Leave empty if no authentication is required (typical for local networks).

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: How often to poll the printer for status updates.

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname / IP
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the OctoPrint server.

parameter.name: apiKey
parameter.label: API Key
parameter.description: OctoPrint API key (found in OctoPrint Settings → API).

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: How often to poll the printer for status updates.
